• About this track: World's Smallest Violin might be one of the worst songs to ever try to bootleg.
BPM: 150 BPM (0:00 to 1:20), 132 BPM gradually to 138 BPM (1:20 to 1:34), 138 BPM (1:34 to 1:48), 138 BPM gradually to 171 BPM (1:48 to 1:57), 171 BPM (1:57 to 2:48), 150BPM (2:48 to END)

14.title: 299,792,458ms
description: • Programmed, Produced & Mixed by pencil (Dochakuso Records)
• Mastering Engineer: malicent (Cursed Monastery / Sigillum Azoetia)
• Original Track: Fluorite by Mao Arimura (CV: Tsumugi Nanase) [有村麻央 (CV: 七瀬つむぎ)]
• Source: Gakuen IDOLM@STER [学園アイドルマスター]

• About this track: When I'm sampling, I try my best to incorporate the source material differently within my own style, as objectively as I possibly can. Since I prefer songs offering a different vision, I made sure to destructure the original work down to tiny bits, instead of using it plain and simple. [僕はサンプリングをするにあたって、サンプリング元を自分の曲に入れる音として出来るだけフラットな目線で見て、新たな解釈が生まれている曲が好きなので、サンプリング元を出来るだけそのまま使わないように細かく刻む事を心掛けました。]

15.title: Daydream café (PSYQUO's Pyon Pyon Bootleg)
description: • Original Composer: Kaoru Okubo [大久保薫]
• Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by PSYQUO (KodamaSounds)
• Original Track: "Daydream café" by Petit Rabbit's
• Source: Is the Order a Rabbit? [ご注文はうさぎですか?]

• About this track: Hi, It's PSYQUO! GochiUsa was one my favorite series back in the day. It has a lot of music that was and still is an inspiration for me. So, I decided to pay homage and to remix the very first opening - Daydream café. I turned the energy up a notch and made a hardcore track. As always, thanks for listening!
• Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Sonance
• Original Track: "Hibikase [ヒビカセ]" by REOL
• About this track: I wanted to make a Baile Funk track, so I completely reworked the bass track from the original song! [バイレファンキをしたかったので原曲のベースステムを魔改造しました！]

20.title: I Don't Want Your Damn Intelligence!
description: • About this track: It’s a Gabber Disco track! Packed with recognisable (and very dated) samples. Made during mild intoxication.

21.title: WIP (Unfinished)
description: • Original Lyrics: Adam Gubman, Piper Gubman
• Programmed, Produced, Mixed & Mastered by Round Wave Crusher (Rodrigo Rodriguez)
• Original Track: An Unfinished Song [未尽之歌]

• About this track: The original track is called "An Unfinished Song", it's the character song for the "Shorekeeper". The original track has no lyrics for the second part. It's suposed to be completed by the protagonist that never actually came back until he does. That's why the song name is "WIP (Unfinished)".
• Original Composer: Yoshimasa Terui [照井順政]
• Mastering Engineer: malicent (Cursed Monastery / Sigillum Azoetia)
• Original Track: "Kyoumen no Nami [鏡面の波]" by YURiKA
• Source: Land of the Lustrous [宝石の国]
• Used Software: Vital, Zebra3, Serum2, Current, Operator, Repro1, Kontakt8, DX7 V

• About this track: This is a re-arrangement of the OP song from Land of the Lustrous. I tried to replicate the song's structure and progression, before it crumbles, dissipates, and gradually takes a new form through its cracks - similarly to the formation of the Gems from the original story. Hence why I deliberately chose the title "Re-crystallization" instead of "Remix". [原曲はアニメ「宝石の国」のオープニングテーマです。崩れ、霧散し、ほころびから徐々に形作られていく楽曲の展開を原作の宝石たちの成り立ちになぞらえ、RemixではなくあえてRecrystallization(再結晶)を名乗りました。]

footer: All original compositions and characters respective of whoever the hell did what man come on it's a free comp and all sources are in each track details!!!!!
